_meta.purpose: Curated, vetted YouTube luxury-bag review creators + embeddable video resources linked to the seeded hero styles. Feeds the bag-page 'Video reviews' section (migration 0004: creator + resource tables).
_meta.sourcing_rule: Only REAL channels and REAL video IDs that appeared verbatim in web-search results were included (verified 2026-06). Video IDs are taken directly from youtube.com/watch?v= URLs returned by search. Where a video's CHANNEL could not be confidently matched from the search snippet, the resource is left with creator_handle:null rather than guessing an attribution (never-invent rule). Fewer high-confidence entries were preferred over fabricated volume.
_meta.human_gated: Operator runs `npx tsx supabase/seed/seed-creators.ts` with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env.local. Idempotent (creators upsert on channel-or-name; resources upsert on youtube_video_id). 0004 must be applied and hero styles seeded first (resources link to style by brand+name).
_meta.caveat: These are independent reviewer videos embedded under YouTube's standard embed terms; embedding sidesteps image-copyright (handoff 'Images' decision). Confirm each video still resolves before/after seeding; YouTube IDs can be removed by their uploader.
_meta.instagram_note: Instagram creators added 2026-06 (handles verified verbatim in web search). They are rostered now so attribution exists, but individual Instagram POST resource rows are deliberately omitted: the sourcing_rule forbids guessing post URLs/IDs, and Instagram embeds rely on the OFFICIAL authenticated Meta oEmbed Read API + a permission-first posture (NOT YouTube's standard-embed terms — see docs/social-embed-strategy.md). Add `resource_type:'instagram'` rows only with real, verified `https://www.instagram.com/p/<shortcode>/` URLs and (for featured partners) creator permission.

creators.name: The Handbag Husband
creators.description: Long-running handbag review channel covering Hermès, Chanel and other luxury houses with in-depth, episodic reviews.

creators.name: Katie Danger
creators.description: Luxury handbag reviewer; detailed Hermès and designer bag reviews and mod shots.

creators.name: Armcandy Bag Co
creators.description: Reviews of accessible-luxury and contemporary bags including Coach, with what-fits and quality breakdowns.

creators.name: Je suis Lou
creators.description: Barcelona-based luxury handbag collector (~170K YouTube, ~121K Instagram @je.suis.lou). Hermès Birkin/Kelly and Louis Vuitton collection videos, styling and reviews. Featured partner candidate (permission-first).

creators.name: Redeluxe (Georgia Swain)
creators.description: Pre-owned luxury reseller founded by Georgia Swain; authentication-forward, lifetime authenticity guarantee. Strong Instagram visuals of Hermès/Chanel/LV in hand. Reseller-angle partner candidate (permission-first).

creators.name: PurseBop (Monika Arora)
creators.description: Major luxury-handbag community authority (PurseBop.com). Hermès/Chanel/LV education, pricing and market commentary across Instagram and web.

creators.name: Handbag Holic (Steph Turton)
creators.description: Reviews, comparisons and investment-value handbag content across Instagram (@handbag_holic) and YouTube. Strong fit for 'is it worth it' commentary.
